docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKELADZE, GEORGI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER DANIEL HSUEH. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE 3-28-16. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHAN, YUK WA AS TO DEFENDANT MIKELADZE, GEORGI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
